name: Echoes of the Mire
summary: The bog gave back a name nobody wanted to say aloud. Whoever carries its mark will draw the rest.

stages.summary: Recover the iron coffer the priest of Sevrenne lost to the bog.
Open the shrine the coffer's seal pointed to, before the cult moves the bones.
Confront the bog-touched envoy at the cairn under the broken moon.

name: The Lowmark Bounty
summary: The Lowmark Guild has put your fort's name on a slate in every counting-house. Hunt their bounty captain before his hires reach your gate.

stages.summary: Run down the Guild tracker scouting your approach roads.
Corner the bounty captain in the burned hamlet and end the contract.

name: Vengeance for the Fallen
summary: A bonded comrade fell. The survivors are not going to let the road that killed them stay open. The fort owes its dead a reckoning.

stages.summary: Pick up the killers' trail before the rain takes it.
Settle the debt. Make sure the name spreads.
